languages.text: After character uses galvanized ability, they gains +2 AP and +3 MP.

languages.text: After {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsOverdriveFullGlossary}galvanising{/g} an {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentsFullGlossary}augment{/g}, the user gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and +3 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

traits.locale_text: After galvanising an augment, the user gains +2 AP and +3 MP.
